name: kerboffice
description: KerbOffice — AI-native work management platform with Kerbal agents

scripts.package: npm run build && npx tsc -p tsconfig.electron.json && npx @electron/packager . "KerbOffice" --platform=win32 --arch=x64 --out=release --icon=build/icons/icon.ico --overwrite --asar --prune=true
scripts.package:mac: npm run build && npx tsc -p tsconfig.electron.json && npx @electron/packager . "KerbOffice" --platform=darwin --arch=x64 --out=release --icon=build/icons/icon.icns --overwrite --asar --prune=true
scripts.package:linux: npm run build && npx tsc -p tsconfig.electron.json && npx @electron/packager . "KerbOffice" --platform=linux --arch=x64 --out=release --icon=build/icons/icon.png --overwrite --asar --prune=true
